item.title: [Segurança] Cisco Patches 9.8 CVSS IMC and SSM Flaws Allowing Remote System Compromise
item.description:
🚨 Cisco Patches 9.8 CVSS IMC and SSM Flaws Allowing Remote System Compromise
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Cisco has released updates to address a critical security flaw in the Integrated Management Controller (IMC) that, if successfully exploited, could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass authentication and gain access to the system with elevated privileges. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-20093, carries a CVSS score of 9.8 out of a maximum of 10.0.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/cisco-patches-98-cvss-imc-and-ssm-flaws.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-7024 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-7024 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.3
Resumo:
Incorrect Default Permissions vulnerability in AIRBUS PSS TETRA Connectivity Server on Windows Server OS allows Privilege Abuse. An attacker may execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges if a user is tricked or directed to place a crafted file into the vulnerable directory. This issue affects TETRA connectivity Server: 7.0. Vulnerability fix is available and delivered to impacted customers.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-7024

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-1540 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-1540 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.2
Resumo:
The Spam Protect for Contact Form 7 WordPress plugin before 1.2.10 allows logging to a PHP file, which could allow an attacker with editor access to achieve Remote Code Execution by using a crafted header
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1540

item.title: [Segurança] Hackers Exploit CVE-2025-55182 to Breach 766 Next.js Hosts, Steal Credentials
item.description:
🚨 Hackers Exploit CVE-2025-55182 to Breach 766 Next.js Hosts, Steal Credentials
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A large-scale credential harvesting operation has been observed exploiting the React2Shell vulnerability as an initial infection vector to steal database credentials, SSH private keys, Amazon Web Services (AWS) secrets, shell command history, Stripe API keys, and GitHub tokens at scale. Cisco Talos has attributed the operation to a threat cluster it tracks as
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/hackers-exploit-cve-2025-55182-to.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8140-1: Cairo vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8140-1: Cairo vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 8.0
Resumo:
Alberto Garcia, Francisco Oca and Suleman Ali discovered that Cairo did not properly manage memory. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Cairo to crash, resulting in a denial of service. This issue only affected Ubuntu 18.04 LTS, Ubuntu 20.04 LTS and Ubuntu 22.04 LTS. (CVE-2017-9814) It was discovered that Cairo incorrectly handled certain angle values when drawing arcs. An attacker could possibly use t...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8140-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8148-3: Linux kernel (Real-time) vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8148-3: Linux kernel (Real-time) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - Cryptographic API; - Netfilter; - Network traffic control; (CVE-2026-23060, CVE-2026-23074, CVE-2026-23111)
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8148-3

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-23419 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-23419 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: net/rds: Fix circular locking dependency in rds_tcp_tune syzbot reported a circular locking dependency in rds_tcp_tune() where sk_net_refcnt_upgrade() is called while holding the socket lock: ====================================================== WARNING: possible circular locking dependency detected ==================================================...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23419

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-33990 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-33990 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Docker Model Runner (DMR) is software used to manage, run, and deploy AI models using Docker. Prior to version 1.1.25, Docker Model Runner contains an SSRF vulnerability in its OCI registry token exchange flow. When pulling a model, Model Runner follows the realm URL from the registry's WWW-Authenticate header without validating the scheme, hostname, or IP range. A malicious OCI registry can set the realm to an inter...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33990

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-5417 - Elastic
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-5417 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.7
Resumo:
A vulnerability was determined in Dataease SQLbot up to 1.6.0. This issue affects the function get_es_data_by_http of the file backend/apps/db/es_engine.py of the component Elasticsearch Handler. This manipulation of the argument address causes server-side request forgery. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. Upgrading to version 1.7.0 is capable of addressing this issue. The vendor was contac...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5417

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-27774 - Acronis
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-27774 - Acronis
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Acronis
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.7
Resumo:
Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis True Image (Windows) before build 42902.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27774

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-34830 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-34830 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.9
Resumo:
Prior to versions 2.2.23, 3.1.21, and 3.2.6, Rack::Sendfile#map_accel_path interpolates the value of the X-Accel-Mapping request header directly into a regular expression when rewriting file paths for X-Accel-Redirect. Because the header value is not escaped, an attacker who can supply X-Accel-Mapping to the backend can inject regex metacharacters and control the generated X-Accel-Redirect response header. In deploym...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34830

item.title: [Segurança] Claude Code leak used to push infostealer malware on GitHub
item.description:
💣 Claude Code leak used to push infostealer malware on GitHub
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors are exploiting the recent Claude Code source code leak by using fake GitHub repositories to deliver Vidar information-stealing malware.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/claude-code-leak-used-to-push-infostealer-malware-on-github/

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Multiple Vulnerabilities in Progress ShareFile Could Allow for Remote Code Execution
item.description:
📢 Multiple Vulnerabilities in Progress ShareFile Could Allow for Remote Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a CIS Advisories, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/multiple-vulnerabilities-in-progress-sharefile-could-allow-for-remote-code-execution_2026-030

item.title: [Segurança] HF Advisory Group LLC Grows Stake in Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. $CHKP - marketbeat.com
item.description:
📢 HF Advisory Group LLC Grows Stake in Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. $CHKP - marketbeat.com
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a Check Point, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Webinar Recap: Converging VMware vSphere to VMware Cloud Foundation 9.0
item.description:
📰 Webinar Recap: Converging VMware vSphere to VMware Cloud Foundation 9.0
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
Converging a VMware vSphere environment into VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.0 is an architectural shift. You are transitioning from standalone products to a unified private cloud platform. It is an architectural change that requires you to align legacy configurations with a rigid, automated framework.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/02/webinar-recap-converging-vmware-vsphere-to-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-0/

item.title: [Segurança] Evolution of Ransomware: Multi-Extortion Ransomware Attacks
item.description:
📰 Evolution of Ransomware: Multi-Extortion Ransomware Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Multi-extortion ransomware relies on stolen data to pressure victims with public leaks. Penta Security explains how its D.AMO platform keeps exfiltrated files encrypted and useless to attackers.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/evolution-of-ransomware-multi-extortion-ransomware-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] Why Third-Party Risk Is the Biggest Gap in Your Clients' Security Posture
item.description:
📰 Why Third-Party Risk Is the Biggest Gap in Your Clients' Security Posture
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The next major breach hitting your clients probably won't come from inside their walls. It'll come through a vendor they trust, a SaaS tool their finance team signed up for, or a subcontractor nobody in IT knows about. That's the new attack surface, and most organizations are underprepared for it. Cynomi's new guide, Securing the Modern Perimeter: The Rise of Third-Party
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/why-third-party-risk-is-biggest-gap-in.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8146-1: libjxl vulnerability
item.description:
📰 USN-8146-1: libjxl vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Daniel Novomeský discovered that libjxl did not properly manage memory when decoding certain files. An attacker could use this issue to cause libjxl to crash, resulting in denial of service, or possibly execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8146-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Defending Your Software Supply Chain: What Every Engineering Team Should Do Now
item.description:
📰 Defending Your Software Supply Chain: What Every Engineering Team Should Do Now
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The software supply chain is under sustained attack. Not from a single threat actor or a single incident, but from an ecosystem-wide campaign that has been escalating for months and shows no signs of slowing down. This week, axios, the HTTP client library downloaded 83 million times per week and present in roughly 80% of...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/defending-your-software-supply-chain-what-every-engineering-team-should-do-now/
